---
title: "Journeys"
format:
  html:
    css:
      - ../assets/css/custom.css
      - ../assets/css/map.css
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    title-block-banner: false
    include-after-body:
      - text: <script src="https://api.mapbox.com/mapbox-gl-js/v3.0.1/mapbox-gl.js"></script>
      - text: <script src="../assets/js/map.js"></script>
listing:
  - id: china-journeys
    contents:
      - guizhou.qmd
      - qinghai.qmd
      - inner-mongolia.qmd
      - beijing.qmd
      - hainan.qmd
    type: table
    fields: [title, subtitle, date]
    sort: [date]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 20
    field-display-names:
      title: "Journey"
      subtitle: "Subtitle"
      date: "Date"
  - id: us-journeys
    contents:
      - california.qmd
      - everglades.qmd
      - playa.qmd
    type: table
    fields: [title, subtitle, date]
    sort: [date]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 20
    field-display-names:
      title: "Journey"
      subtitle: "Subtitle"
      date: "Date"
---

::: {.journeys-hero .container}
## Journeys

**Places that reshaped how I see the world.**

Some places taught me ecology. Some taught me systems. Some taught me computation. Some revealed entirely new ways of seeing. Together they became the foundation of Thinking Across Scales.
:::

::: {.section .container .journeys-map-shell}
::: {.row .gx-4 .gy-4 .align-items-start}
::: {.col-12 .col-lg-7}
::: {.map-card}
<div id="journey-map" aria-label="Interactive map of journey locations"></div>
<p id="map-status" class="map-status">Loading locations…</p>
:::
:::

::: {.col-12 .col-lg-5}
::: {.preview-card}
<div class="preview-image" role="img" aria-label="Everglades landscape placeholder"></div>
<div class="preview-copy">
<h3>Everglades</h3>
<p class="preview-meta">Florida, USA · 2009–2015</p>
<p>The landscape where I first learned to think across scales, reading water, fire, and time as one system.</p>
<a class="panel-button" href="everglades.qmd">Read Journey →</a>
</div>
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section .container}
## China

::: {#china-journeys}
:::

## United States

::: {#us-journeys}
:::
:::
